hooks.command: node -e "const c=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')).tool_input?.command||''; const blocked=[/git\s+reset\s+--hard/,/git\s+push\s+.*--force(?!-with-lease)/,/git\s+clean\s+-[a-zA-Z]*f/,/git\s+checkout\s+--\s+\./,/rm\s+.*factharbor\.db/,/sqlite3\s+.*factharbor\.db/,/npm\s+run\s+test:(llm|neutrality|cb-integration|expensive|calibration)/,/npx\s+vitest.*\b(llm-integration|input-neutrality|claimboundary-integration)\b/]; const hit=blocked.find(r=>r.test(c)); if(hit){console.error('BLOCKED by safety hook: '+c.slice(0,100));process.exit(2)}"
